summary: S&P 500 +0.46% to 7168.62, Nasdaq +0.21% to 24724.49, Dow +1.49% to 49588.34 on April 30. Big tech mixed: Alphabet +9%, Meta -9%, Microsoft -5%. Caterpillar rallied after earnings. Fed held rates steady. April on track for best month since late 2020.
